_metadata.name: API Surface Exposure Triage
_metadata.description: Authorized bug bounty workflow that crawls seed URLs, probes likely API documentation and GraphQL surfaces, runs focused Nuclei exposure checks, and writes a prioritized API exposure report.
_metadata.author: sentris-team

manifest.name: API Surface Exposure Triage
manifest.description: Find exposed API documentation, GraphQL consoles, debug/admin paths, and API-related exposure signals from authorized seed URLs.
manifest.author: sentris-team

graph.name: API Surface Exposure Triage
graph.description: Focused API surface workflow for authorized bug bounty assets.

runtimeInputs.label: Seed URLs
runtimeInputs.description: Authorized HTTP/HTTPS URLs to inspect for API exposure.

runtimeInputs.label: Known API paths
runtimeInputs.description: Optional program-known API paths such as /api, /graphql, /swagger, or /api-docs.

runtimeInputs.label: Scan intensity
runtimeInputs.description: Use safe or thorough. Safe keeps candidate generation tightly bounded.

runtimeInputs.label: Authorization notes
runtimeInputs.description: Program scope, exclusions, and rate-limit notes to copy into the report.
